title: Screed Calculator
shortDescription: Calculate the amount of material for cement, anhydrite, or self-leveling screed.
metaTitle: Screed Calculator Online | Calculate Material, Volume and Bags
metaDescription: Use the screed calculator to estimate screed volume, total mix weight, and the number of bags needed for cement, anhydrite, or self-leveling screed.
intro: Estimate screed material quickly for floors, renovations, and underfloor heating jobs. Enter the area, thickness, waste allowance, and bag weight to get volume, total kilograms, and bag count.
overview: This screed calculator helps you plan cement screed, anhydrite screed, and self-leveling screed. It converts floor area and thickness into volume, then estimates total material weight and the number of bags, including waste.
howItWorks: Enter the floor area in square meters.
Set the screed thickness in millimeters.
Add a waste percentage for practical overage.
Enter the bag weight to calculate bag count.
useCases: Estimating screed for new floors and renovations.
Planning material for underfloor heating screed.
Comparing cement, anhydrite, and self-leveling screed needs.

examples.title: Example calculation
examples.input: Area: 20 m2, thickness: 50 mm, consumption: 2.0 kg/m2/mm, waste: 5%, bag weight: 25 kg
examples.output: Volume: 1.00 m3, total mix: 2,100 kg, bags: 84.
examples.description: A practical estimate for a medium room.

examples.title: Underfloor heating floor
examples.input: Area: 45 m2, thickness: 60 mm, consumption: 1.8 kg/m2/mm, waste: 7%, bag weight: 25 kg
examples.output: Volume: 2.70 m3, total mix: 5,106 kg, bags: 205.
examples.description: Useful for screeds over heating pipes.

faq.question: How is screed volume calculated?
faq.answer: Volume is calculated from area multiplied by thickness converted to meters.

faq.question: Can I use this for self-leveling compound?
faq.answer: Yes. Enter the product’s consumption or density to estimate the required amount.

faq.question: Why add waste?
faq.answer: Waste covers spills, uneven subfloors, and small job losses during mixing and application.

faq.question: Does the calculator work for bagged products?
faq.answer: Yes. Enter the bag weight and it will estimate how many bags you need.

seo.title: Screed Calculator Online
seo.description: Estimate screed volume, material weight, and bag count for cement, anhydrite, and self-leveling screed.
